claim: No Stable, release, conformance, manual assistive-technology, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.rolePolicy: Action, toolbar, list, and tag semantics are never inferred from visual clustering.

layout.intrinsic: A wrapping flex row uses semantic inline gaps and zero minimum inline sizes.
layout.orphan: start preserves a logical leading-edge orphan and disables growth; fill grows only the final child.
layout.readingOrder: No order property is used, so DOM, focus, and visual sequence stay aligned.

consumerResponsibilities: Use a semantic list, fieldset, toolbar, or navigation wrapper when the clustered content requires it.
Use orphan=fill only when the final child has a safe stretching contract.
Do not use CSS order to diverge focus and reading order.
